column1: Table 2: Accuracy with gold doc + varying number of RANDOM docs (oracle setting)
Closed-book accuracy: Llama2=0.1123  MPT=0.1205  Phi-2=0.0488  Falcon=0.1083
Key result: MPT Near improves from 0.2148 (0 random) to 0.2930 (4 random) = +0.0782 (+36%) — paper's "0.08 (+36%)" claim
Key result: Llama2 Near improves from 0.5642 (0 random) to 0.5859 (14 random) = +0.0217 (+3.9%) — modest improvement
* = NOT statistically significant change from gold-only baseline (Wilcoxon p<0.01)
- = prompt exceeded model input limit (data truncation risk)
